title: Team Manifest
description: Internal manifest generated by the analysis phase of build_team. Drives the rendering and emit phases. Not intended for direct user editing.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version for forward compatibility.

project_goal.description: Project goal string, verbatim from project description.

deliverable_type.description: Formatted string describing deliverable types (e.g., 'HTML chapter files and LaTeX manuscript').

selected_archetypes.description: List of domain archetype slugs selected for this project.

tool_agents.description: List of tool-specific agents to generate (each becomes a separate agent file).

docs_url.description: Official documentation URL carried through from the project description.

api_surface.description: Key API surface text carried through from the project description.

common_patterns.description: Common patterns and pitfalls text carried through from the project description.

reference_tools.description: List of reference-tier tools that generate lightweight reference files (not full agents).

docs_url.description: Official documentation URL carried through from the project description.

api_surface.description: Key API surface text carried through from the project description.

common_patterns.description: Common patterns and pitfalls text carried through from the project description.

components.description: List of workstream components, each generating one workstream expert agent.

tools.description: Tool names relevant to this component, linking workstream experts to tool specialists/references.

authority_hierarchy.description: Ordered list of authority sources for {AUTHORITY_HIERARCHY} placeholder. Rank 1 = highest authority.

agent_slug_list.description: Complete list of all agent slugs to be generated — used for orchestrator's agents: list and routing table.

auto_resolved_placeholders.description: Key-value map of all {PLACEHOLDER_NAME} tokens that were automatically resolved from the project description and analysis.

manual_required_placeholders.description: List of {MANUAL:PLACEHOLDER_NAME} tokens that could not be auto-resolved and require human attention. These go into SETUP-REQUIRED.md.

context.description: Surrounding prose that helps the user understand what to fill in.

suggestion.description: Suggested value if one can be inferred.

output_files.description: List of all files the emit phase will write.

path.description: Output file path, relative to agents_output_dir.

template.description: Source template file path relative to the module's templates/ directory.

fallback_template.description: Fallback template path if the primary template does not exist (e.g., category-specific template not yet created).

component_slug.description: For workstream expert agents: the component slug this file serves.
